---
title: "Visualization_AlphaD2_VS_MIND2"
output: html_document
date: "2025-12-05"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r}
df <- read_csv("game_results/gomoku_random_tests_&_AB_d2_vs_Minimax_d1.csv")

df$matchup <- as.factor(df$matchup)
```

```{r}
win_rates <- df %>%
  group_by(matchup, winner) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop_last") %>%
  mutate(win_rate = n / sum(n) * 100)

win_rates
```

```{r}
starter_stats <- df %>%
  group_by(matchup, starter, winner) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop_last") %>%
  mutate(pct = n / sum(n) * 100)

starter_stats
```

```{r}
node_stats <- df %>%
  group_by(matchup) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_nodes_agent1 = mean(nodes_agent1),
    avg_nodes_agent2 = mean(nodes_agent2)
  )

node_stats
```

```{r}
time_stats <- df %>%
  group_by(matchup) %>%
  summarise(
    early = mean(avg_time_early_agent1),
    mid   = mean(avg_time_mid_agent1),
    late  = mean(avg_time_late_agent1)
  )

time_stats
```

```{r}
df %>%
  summarise(
    early = mean(avg_time_early_agent1),
    mid   = mean(avg_time_mid_agent1),
    late  = mean(avg_time_late_agent1)
  )
```

```{r}
correlations <- df %>%
  group_by(matchup) %>%
  summarise(
    cor_nodes_time_agent1 = cor(nodes_agent1, time_agent1),
    cor_nodes_time_agent2 = cor(nodes_agent2, time_agent2)
  )

correlations
```

```{r}

matchups <- df %>% split(.$matchup)

matchups$AB_d2_vs_Random
matchups$AB_d2_vs_Minimax_d1
```

```{r}
df_ab_min <- df %>% 
  filter(matchup == "AB_d2_vs_Minimax_d1")

time_summary <- tibble(
  phase = c("early", "mid", "end"),
  
  AB_d2 = c(
    mean(df_ab_min$avg_time_early_agent1),
    mean(df_ab_min$avg_time_mid_agent1),
    mean(df_ab_min$avg_time_late_agent1)
  ),
  
  Minimax_d1 = c(
    mean(df_ab_min$avg_time_early_agent2),
    mean(df_ab_min$avg_time_mid_agent2),
    mean(df_ab_min$avg_time_late_agent2)
  )
)

time_summary$phase <- factor(time_summary$phase, levels = c("early", "mid", "end"))

time_long <- time_summary %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c("AB_d2", "Minimax_d1"),
               names_to = "agent",
               values_to = "time")

light_orange <- "#eed5b1"
gray_brown   <- "#8C6D62"

gomoku_colors <- c(
  "AB_d2" = light_orange,
  "Minimax_d1" = gray_brown
)

ggplot(time_long, aes(x = phase, y = time, group = agent, color = agent)) +
  geom_line(size = 2) +
  geom_point(size = 6, stroke = 1.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = gomoku_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "Move Time Comparison",
    x = "Game Phase",
    y = "Average Time per Move (seconds)",
    color = "Agent"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "lightgrey", size = 0.4),
    panel.grid.minor = element_line(color = "lightgrey", size = 0.2),
    axis.title = element_text(color = "black"),
    axis.text  = element_text(color = "black"),
    legend.position = "top"
  )
  )
```

```{r}
df_sub <- df %>% 
  filter(matchup == "AB_d2_vs_Minimax_d1")

avg_time_ab  <- mean(df_sub$time_agent1, na.rm = TRUE)
avg_time_min <- mean(df_sub$time_agent2, na.rm = TRUE)

avg_nodes_ab  <- mean(df_sub$nodes_agent1, na.rm = TRUE)
avg_nodes_min <- mean(df_sub$nodes_agent2, na.rm = TRUE)

avg_cutoffs_ab <- mean(df_sub$cutoffs_agent1, na.rm = TRUE)

cat("Average total thinking time per game:\n")
cat("  AlphaBeta(d=2):", avg_time_ab, "seconds\n")
cat("  Minimax(d=1):",  avg_time_min, "seconds\n\n")

cat("Average nodes expanded per game:\n")
cat("  AlphaBeta(d=2):", avg_nodes_ab, "\n")
cat("  Minimax(d=1):",  avg_nodes_min, "\n\n")

cat("Average AlphaBeta cutoffs per game:", avg_cutoffs_ab, "\n")
```

```{r}
compute_winrates <- function(data, starter_name) {
  d <- data %>% filter(starter == starter_name)
  total <- nrow(d)
  
  tibble(
    starter = starter_name,
    AlphaBeta_wins = sum(d$winner == "AlphaBetaAgent_Depth2") / total * 100,
    Minimax_wins   = sum(d$winner == "MinimaxAgent_Depth1") / total * 100,
    Draws          = sum(d$winner == "draw" | d$winner == 0) / total * 100
  )
}

ab_first  <- compute_winrates(df_sub, "AlphaBetaAgent_Depth2")
min_first <- compute_winrates(df_sub, "MinimaxAgent_Depth1")

cat("Win Rate\n\n")

cat("AlphaBeta(d=2) as first player:",
    sprintf("%.1f %%", ab_first$AlphaBeta_wins), "\n")
cat("Minimax(d=1) as second player:",
    sprintf("%.1f %%", ab_first$Minimax_wins), "\n")
cat("Draw:",
    sprintf("%.1f %%", ab_first$Draws), "\n\n")

cat("Minimax(d=1) as first player:",
    sprintf("%.1f %%", min_first$Minimax_wins), "\n")
cat("AlphaBeta(d=2) as second player:",
    sprintf("%.1f %%", min_first$AlphaBeta_wins), "\n")
cat("Draw:",
    sprintf("%.1f %%", min_first$Draws), "\n")
```

```{r}


df_ab_min <- df %>% 
  filter(matchup == "AB_d2_vs_Minimax_d1")

thinking_summary <- tibble(
  agent = c("AB_d2", "Minimax_d1"),
  avg_time = c(
    mean(df_ab_min$time_agent1, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean(df_ab_min$time_agent2, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
)


light_orange <- "#eed5b1"
gray_brown   <- "#8C6D62"

gomoku_colors <- c(
  "AB_d2" = light_orange,
  "Minimax_d1" = gray_brown
)

ggplot(thinking_summary, aes(x = agent, y = avg_time, fill = agent)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = gomoku_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "Average Total Thinking Time per Game",
    x = "",
    y = "Thinking Time (seconds)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +
  theme(
    plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "lightgrey", size = 0.4),
    panel.grid.minor = element_line(color = "lightgrey", size = 0.2),
    axis.title = element_text(color = "black"),
    axis.text  = element_text(color = "black"),
    legend.position = "none"
  )
```
